description: Build a Stripe coupon management system within the 60 platform admin — CRUD coupons/promotion codes, modify billing to accept and display coupons, track redemptions via webhooks, show analytics.

userStories.title: Database schema for coupon tracking
userStories.description: As a platform admin, I need database tables to store coupon metadata and track redemptions so that coupon data is queryable locally without hitting the Stripe API for every read.
acceptanceCriteria: stripe_coupons table with all columns: id, stripe_coupon_id, name, discount_type, discount_value, currency, duration, duration_in_months, max_redemptions, times_redeemed, redeem_by, applies_to_products, is_active, metadata, created_by, created_at, updated_at
coupon_redemptions table: id, coupon_id, org_id, stripe_promotion_code_id, promotion_code, stripe_subscription_id, stripe_checkout_session_id, discount_amount_cents, applied_at, removed_at

stripe_promotion_codes table: id, coupon_id, stripe_promotion_code_id, code, is_active, max_redemptions, times_redeemed, expires_at, customer_restriction, first_time_only, minimum_amount_cents, minimum_amount_currency, created_at
RLS policies: platform admins can CRUD all tables; service role has full access
Indexes on stripe_coupon_id, code, and org_id
Migration uses DROP POLICY IF EXISTS before CREATE POLICY
Migration created via ./scripts/new-migration.sh
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Schema story — must complete before backend stories. Follow existing billing table patterns.

userStories.title: Coupon admin edge function
userStories.description: As a platform admin, I need a backend API to create, list, update, and delete coupons and promotion codes so that coupon management is handled securely server-side via the Stripe API.
acceptanceCriteria: New edge function coupon-admin-router/index.ts with router pattern (follows stripe-router)
list_coupons handler: reads from local stripe_coupons table with promotion code counts
create_coupon handler: calls stripe.coupons.create(), inserts into stripe_coupons
update_coupon handler: calls stripe.coupons.update() (name/metadata only), updates local
delete_coupon handler: calls stripe.coupons.del(), marks is_active = false locally
create_promotion_code handler: calls stripe.promotionCodes.create(), inserts into stripe_promotion_codes
list_promotion_codes handler: reads from stripe_promotion_codes filtered by coupon_id
update_promotion_code handler: calls stripe.promotionCodes.update() (active status)
apply_to_subscription handler: calls stripe.subscriptions.update({ coupon }) for existing subscribers
Auth: JWT validation + platform admin check
In-memory rate limiting: 20 req/min per IP on create/update actions
Uses getStripeClient() from _shared/stripe.ts, getCorsHeaders(req), pins @2.43.4
TypeScript types added to src/lib/types/subscription.ts
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Backend story — follows stripe-router handler pattern. Includes apply_to_subscription for existing subscribers.

userStories.title: Coupon admin page
userStories.description: As a platform admin, I want a dedicated page to view and manage all coupons so that I can create discounts, generate promotion codes, and monitor usage without leaving 60.
acceptanceCriteria: New page CouponAdmin at /platform/coupons behind PlatformAdminRouteGuard
Route registered in App.tsx, lazy import in lazyPages.tsx
Navigation link added to platform admin nav
Coupons table: name, type, value, duration, redemptions/max, status badge, created date
Create Coupon dialog: name, discount type toggle, value, currency, duration, duration_in_months, max redemptions, redeem by, plan restriction
Per-coupon row actions: View Promo Codes, Edit, Deactivate/Reactivate, Delete
Expandable promo codes per coupon with create/deactivate actions
Create Promotion Code dialog: code, max redemptions, expires at, customer restriction, first-time-only, minimum amount
Frontend service couponAdminService.ts calling coupon-admin-router via supabase.functions.invoke()
React Query hooks: useCoupons(), useCreateCoupon(), usePromotionCodes(), useCreatePromotionCode()
Toast notifications on all CRUD operations
Empty state, Lucide icons only, dark mode support
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175
userStories.notes: Frontend story — follows PricingControl page pattern. Largest story but scoped to one page.

userStories.title: Stripe webhook discount handlers
userStories.description: As the system, I need to capture discount events from Stripe webhooks so that local coupon data stays in sync and redemptions are tracked.
acceptanceCriteria: Extend webhook-integrations/handlers/stripe.ts with customer.discount.created and customer.discount.deleted handlers
handleDiscountCreated: updates organization_subscriptions.discount_info, inserts coupon_redemptions, increments times_redeemed
handleDiscountDeleted: sets removed_at on coupon_redemptions, clears discount_info
Extract discount data from existing checkout.session.completed handler
All events logged to billing_event_log for idempotency
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Integration story — extends existing webhook handler. Critical for keeping local data in sync.

userStories.title: Customer billing discount display
userStories.description: As a customer, I want to see my active discount on the billing page so that I know what coupon is applied, how much I'm saving, and when it expires.
acceptanceCriteria: New ActiveDiscount component on BillingSettingsPage
Shows: coupon name, discount value, duration remaining, savings per billing cycle
Reads from organization_subscriptions.discount_info JSONB
Hidden when no active discount
Badge styling: green active, amber expiring (<1 month), grey expired
Dark mode support
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175
userStories.notes: Small UI story — reads existing data, no new API calls needed.

userStories.title: Coupon usage analytics
userStories.description: As a platform admin, I want to see coupon performance metrics in the billing analytics dashboard so that I can measure the revenue impact of discounts.
acceptanceCriteria: New Coupons section in BillingAnalytics page
Metrics: total active coupons, total redemptions (7d/30d/all-time), total discount given, redemption rate
Per-coupon table: code, redemptions, total discount amount, last used
Revenue impact: estimated MRR reduction from active discounts
Data from stripe_coupons, coupon_redemptions, stripe_promotion_codes tables
React Query hook: useCouponAnalytics()
Follows existing BillingAnalytics card patterns, dark mode support
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175
userStories.notes: Analytics story — extends existing BillingAnalytics page. Depends on schema + webhook data.
